_note: Criteria used by Claude to identify and shortlist target institutions per lead. Must-haves are hard filters. Ranking boosts affect prioritisation but do not exclude.

ownership.description: Institution must have international investors, lenders, or shareholders — including DFI-backed (IFC, FMO, DEG, AfDB, EBRD, etc.) and any foreign equity or debt stakeholders
exclude: Fully state-owned institutions with no international stakeholders
Subsidiaries or members of a larger banking group where the parent would make tooling decisions centrally

asset_size.description: Minimum total assets of EUR 20 million

regulation.description: Must be a regulated financial institution — preference for licensed commercial banks and regulated MFIs
exclude: pure deposit-takers with no lending book

business_model.description: Must have a lending-heavy business model with retail, SME, or microfinance exposure — not purely corporate or wholesale lenders

big4_audit.description: Institution audited by a Big 4 firm (Deloitte, PwC, EY, KPMG) — indicates governance maturity and readiness for IFRS compliance tooling

ifrs9_regulatory_pressure.description: Institution is in a country where IFRS 9 adoption is newly mandated or a compliance deadline is approaching — increases urgency of ECL tooling need

dfi_backed.description: DFI investors (IFC, FMO, DEG, AfDB, EBRD, Proparco, BIO, etc.) often require IFRS 9 compliance as a loan covenant — strong signal of tooling need
